ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Gavini Sambigucii Sardi Sassarensis In Hermatenam Bocchiam Interpretatio
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Ad Illustriss. Et Reverendiss. D. Salvatorem Salapussium Archiepis. Sassarensem Sacri Tridentini Concilij Decanum et Caesareae Maiestatis a Consiliis. In qua pertractantur et referuntur ea quae sequenti pagina continentur
ItacWorkItem.Notes: In the colophon: different typographic ornament; Bononiae apud Antonium Manutium Aldi filium 13 Decembris 1556
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
